scope: Golden vectors for dispatching serialized UI ActionRef events back into applet handlers and diffing the next UI tree.

cases.note: tap handler updates state and returns one text patch
TextField onChange payload updates field value and preview text
two sequential events accumulate state and emit two patches
ActionRef missing from current tree is rejected without mutating state
payload validation failure is a typed error with prior tree intact
handler performs a deterministic ctx.db write before rendering the next tree
event inside a keyed list patches only the addressed item
handler returns an identical tree and produces an empty patch
handler exception is surfaced as a runtime error; prior tree is unchanged
same event sequence produces byte-identical patches and final tree
event for a suspended applet is rejected before dispatch
event on a component with no handler is ignored safely
